use_cases: Display placeholder content while data is loading to maintain layout stability
Show skeleton states for cards, avatars, and list items during async operations
Provide visual feedback with shimmer animation during content fetching
Create smooth loading transitions that prevent layout shift
Use configurable variants and sizes for different content types
ai_summary: A versatile skeleton loader component with multiple variants (default, secondary, text, circle, avatar) and size options for different content placeholders. Features a polished shimmer animation effect with configurable duration, making it ideal for loading states in SaaS applications, e-commerce product grids, and media content loading. The atomic component uses class-variance-authority for type-safe prop handling and includes shimmer animation with customizable timing.
